name: devchrono-jsonlab
description: Production-grade developer utilities: Epoch Converter & JSON Viewer

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.dev:turbo: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev:turbo --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/.next apps/*/dist packages/*/dist node_modules
